name: AU ixigo Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous year

pros: Excellent 5% return on ixigo bookings for frequent travellers
Low annual fee of ₹499 with easy ₹1.5L waiver threshold

Users who want a low-cost travel rewards card

faqs.question: What is ixigo money and how can I use it?
faqs.answer: ixigo money is the reward currency that can be used for bookings on the ixigo platform including flights, trains, buses, and hotels. It works like a wallet balance within the ixigo app.

faqs.question: Does the 5% reward apply to all ixigo bookings?
faqs.answer: Yes, the 5% ixigo money reward applies to all bookings made on the ixigo platform including flights, trains, buses, and hotels. However, it is capped at ₹1,000 per month.

faqs.question: Can I redeem rewards outside of ixigo?
faqs.answer: No, ixigo money earned through this card can only be redeemed on the ixigo platform for travel bookings. It cannot be converted to cash or used at other merchants.

faqs.question: Is the ₹499 fee worth it?
faqs.answer: The ₹500 welcome ixigo credit more than covers the joining fee. The annual fee is waived at ₹1.5L spend. If you book travel on ixigo even a few times a year, the 5% return easily justifies the cost.
